'''Omar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Omar system/Legends|system of the same name]].

==History==
Three [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Omar (Deep Space Manufacturing Facilities)|production facilities]] were located at Omar. The facilities produced [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The facilities were destroyed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in an attempt to eliminate the Empire's advanced war materials.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
